title: Swords And Zombies
description: Guns? No Knights and Swords! Fight off Zombies!
body:
![Swords And Zombies Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec7940bec3b66ec4bb521a4f09e4fd7e1776537f.png)

# GET READY TO FIGHT ZOMBIES

Swords and Zombies is a modpack centered around using medival weapons to fight off Zombies instead of guns as most modpacks do. Features weapons from Minecraft Dungeons! 

And don't worry, this modpack has **LOTS** of swords and weapons so don't worry about running out of weapon options!
